grades.expectation: Response covers multiple CQS practice areas (governance, client care, training, file management, cyber security)
grades.reason: Covers governance, client care, training, and file management but completely omits cyber security requirements

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific evidence types needed (e.g. training records, complaints log, SRO details)
grades.reason: Clearly mentions training records, complaints log, SRO contact details, written procedures, and checklists

grades.expectation: Response references the Senior Responsible Officer (SRO) requirement
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions designated CQS Senior Responsible Officer and their responsibilities

grades.expectation: Response mentions protocol compliance monitoring as a CQS requirement
grades.reason: References monitoring compliance with CQS standards and written procedures for adopting/monitoring Conveyancing Protocol compliance

grades.expectation: Response covers cyber security / IT security requirements
grades.reason: No mention of cyber security or IT security requirements whatsoever

grades.expectation: Response mentions file management and supervision requirements
grades.reason: Covers file review procedures and supervision arrangements for conveyancing staff
